valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Fri 10 Apr 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Sat 11 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: Low moving rapidly northeast, expected 150 miles west of Rockall 958 by 1800 Friday. Low Viking 1005 moving slowly southeast losing its identity

Wind
In west, cyclonic, becoming southeasterly, 4 to 6. In east, southeasterly 7 to severe gale 9, decreasing 4 to 6.
Sea state
In west, moderate or rough, occasionally very rough at first. in east, very rough, becoming moderate or rough.
Weather
In west, showers. In east, sleet then fair.
Visibility
In west, moderate becoming good. In east, poor becoming good.
